message:
fix(e2e): improve test stability and resilience

authentication.spec.ts:
- Accept 304 (Not Modified) as valid response for public routes
- Browsers may return cached responses, which is correct behavior

error-handling.spec.ts:
- Add 100ms delay after restoring connection before navigation
- Use waitUntil: "load" for more deterministic navigation timing
- Fixes flaky test where navigation starts before connection is stable

test-fixtures.ts:
- Handle Chrome's 32767 pixel height limit for fullPage screenshots
- Fall back to viewport-only screenshot when fullPage fails due to size
- Log screenshot failures as warnings, not errors (diagnostic aid)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
